question: What is your refund policy?
answer: Our refund policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase. You'll receive a full refund to your original payment method within 5–7 business days once we receive the item.

question: How do I return an item?
answer: Visit our returns portal at flowzint.com/returns and enter your order ID. Select the item and reason then schedule a pickup or drop-off.

question: Can I return a sale item?
answer: Sale items can be returned within 14 days. Final-sale items marked at checkout are non-returnable.

question: How long does my refund take?
answer: Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days after we receive your return. Your bank may take an additional 1–3 days to reflect the credit.

question: Can I get a refund without a receipt?
answer: Yes. If you have your order ID or the email used to place the order we can look up your purchase and process the refund.

question: What if my refund hasn't arrived after 10 days?
answer: Please contact support with your order ID. We'll investigate with our payments team and resolve it within 24 hours.

question: How do I track my shipment?
answer: Visit flowzint.com/track and enter your order ID. You'll also receive an email with a tracking link once your order ships.

question: How long does standard delivery take?
answer: Standard delivery takes 5–7 business days. Express shipping (2–3 days) is available at checkout for an additional fee.

question: Is express shipping available?
answer: Yes. Express shipping (2–3 business days) is available for most pin codes. Select it at checkout before placing your order.

question: Can I change my delivery address after ordering?
answer: Address changes are possible within 2 hours of order placement. After that the order is dispatched and changes cannot be made.

question: My order shows delivered but I didn't receive it.
answer: Please check with neighbours and building reception first. If still not found contact us within 48 hours and we'll investigate and reship or refund.

question: What happens if no one is home during delivery?
answer: The courier will attempt delivery twice. After two failed attempts the package is held at a local hub for 5 days before being returned.

question: How do I cancel my order?
answer: Orders can be cancelled within 2 hours of placement. After that please wait for delivery and use our standard returns process.

question: Can I modify my order after placing it?
answer: Item changes are not possible after an order is confirmed. You can cancel within 2 hours and place a new order with the correct items.

question: I ordered the wrong size. What should I do?
answer: Cancel within 2 hours to reorder. If past that window wait for delivery and start an exchange request at flowzint.com/returns.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa MasterCard Amex) UPI net banking and wallets including Paytm and PhonePe.

question: Is payment on delivery available?
answer: Cash on delivery is available for orders under ₹5000 in eligible pin codes. Select COD at checkout to see if it's available for your address.

question: Is it safe to enter my card details?
answer: Yes. Payments are processed via PCI-DSS compliant gateways. We never store your full card number on our servers.

question: My payment failed but amount was deducted.
answer: This is usually a temporary hold. If it doesn't reverse within 3–5 business days please contact us with your transaction ID and we'll escalate.

question: How do I apply a promo code?
answer: Enter your promo code at checkout in the 'Discount code' field. Codes are case-sensitive and can only be used once per account.

question: My promo code isn't working.
answer: Check the code is entered exactly as given (case-sensitive). Verify the expiry date and minimum cart value. Contact support if it still fails.

question: How do I contact support?
answer: Our support team is available 24/7 via this chat or at support@flowzint.com. Average response time is under 2 hours.

question: What are your support hours?
answer: Live chat is available 24/7. Email support is monitored around the clock with responses within 2 hours on business days.

question: Can I speak to a human agent?
answer: Yes. Type 'human agent' or 'speak to manager' in this chat and you'll be connected to a live agent within 5 minutes.

question: How do I reset my account password?
answer: Click 'Forgot password' on the login page. A reset link will be sent to your registered email and is valid for 15 minutes.

question: How do I change my email address?
answer: Email changes can be made in Account Settings > Profile. For security you'll need to verify both your old and new email addresses.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: Account deletion requests are processed within 7 business days. Contact support to initiate the process. All data is erased per our privacy policy.

question: I can't log into my account.
answer: Try resetting your password first. If the problem persists clear your browser cache or try a different browser. Contact support if still locked out.

question: How do I update my phone number?
answer: Update your phone number in Account Settings > Profile. A one-time password will be sent to the new number to verify it.

question: Do you offer an exchange?
answer: Exchanges are supported within 14 days of delivery. Visit our returns portal to start an exchange request and select your replacement size or item.

question: Can I exchange for a different product?
answer: Cross-product exchanges are possible as long as the value is equal. If the new item costs more you'll pay the difference.

question: What is your size guide?
answer: Our size guide is available on each product page. If you're between sizes we recommend sizing up for comfort. Still unsure? Contact support.

question: The item I received looks different from the photo.
answer: We're sorry. Please share a photo via chat. If it's a genuine difference we'll arrange a free replacement or full refund within 24 hours.

question: I received a damaged item.
answer: We're sorry to hear that! Share a photo of the damaged item via chat and we'll arrange a free replacement or full refund within 24 hours.

question: I received the wrong item.
answer: Apologies for the mix-up. Please share a photo of the wrong item via chat. We'll dispatch the correct item immediately at no extra cost.

question: How do I earn loyalty points?
answer: You earn 10 points for every ₹100 spent. Points are credited within 48 hours of delivery confirmation.

question: How do I redeem loyalty points?
answer: Loyalty points can be redeemed at checkout. 100 points = ₹10 discount. A minimum of 100 points is required per redemption.

question: When do my loyalty points expire?
answer: Points expire 12 months after being credited. Check your points balance and expiry dates in your account dashboard.

question: Can I transfer my loyalty points?
answer: Loyalty points are non-transferable and tied to your account.

question: How do I check my points balance?
answer: Your points balance is visible in your account dashboard under the 'Rewards' section.

question: Do you offer bulk or corporate orders?
answer: For bulk or corporate orders of 10+ items please email bulk@flowzint.com for a custom quote and priority processing.

question: What is the minimum for a bulk order?
answer: Bulk pricing applies to orders of 10 or more units of the same product. Contact bulk@flowzint.com for a custom quote.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: We ship to 45+ countries. International delivery takes 10–15 business days. Customs duties may apply depending on your destination.

question: What countries do you ship to?
answer: We ship to over 45 countries across Asia Europe and North America. Enter your address at checkout to confirm availability.

question: Do I have to pay customs duties?
answer: Customs duties and taxes are the buyer's responsibility and vary by country. We display estimated duties at checkout where possible.

question: What warranty do products come with?
answer: All products include a 1-year manufacturer warranty covering manufacturing defects. Accidental damage and normal wear are excluded.

question: How do I claim warranty?
answer: Contact support with your order ID and a description of the issue. We'll guide you through the warranty claim process.

question: Is warranty transferable?
answer: Warranty is valid only for the original purchaser and is not transferable if the product is resold or gifted.

question: The app isn't loading.
answer: Force-close the app and reopen it. If that doesn't help clear the app cache in your phone settings. Reinstall if the problem persists.

question: I can't add items to my cart.
answer: Try clearing your browser cache or using a different browser. Ensure JavaScript is enabled. Contact support if the issue continues.

question: The checkout page is freezing.
answer: This may be caused by a browser extension or slow connection. Try incognito mode or a different browser. Contact support if it persists.

question: I'm not receiving order confirmation emails.
answer: Check your spam folder. Add support@flowzint.com to your contacts. Verify your email address in account settings.

question: How do I unsubscribe from marketing emails?
answer: Click 'Unsubscribe' at the bottom of any marketing email or go to Account Settings > Notifications to manage your preferences.

question: How do I subscribe to restock alerts?
answer: Go to the product page of an out-of-stock item and click 'Notify me'. You'll get an email when it's back.

question: Is this product available in other colours?
answer: Available variants (colours and sizes) are shown on the product page. If your preferred option isn't listed it's currently out of stock.

question: Can I request a product that's out of stock?
answer: Click 'Notify me' on the product page to get an alert when it's restocked. We don't accept advance orders for out-of-stock items.

question: Do you offer student discounts?
answer: We offer a 10% student discount via our student verification partner. Visit flowzint.com/student to verify your status.

question: Do you have a referral programme?
answer: Yes. Share your referral link from your account dashboard. You earn ₹100 credit for each friend who completes their first order.

question: How does the referral programme work?
answer: Share your unique referral link. When a friend signs up and places their first order you receive ₹100 account credit within 7 days.

question: Can I use multiple discount codes?
answer: Only one discount code can be applied per order. Discount codes cannot be combined with loyalty point redemptions.

question: Do you offer gift wrapping?
answer: Gift wrapping is available for ₹49 per item. Select it at the product or checkout page and add a personalised message.

question: Can I send an order as a gift?
answer: Yes. Enter the recipient's address as the delivery address. Add a gift note at checkout and choose gift wrapping if desired.

question: Do you include an invoice in the package?
answer: A digital invoice is emailed to you. Physical invoices are not included in packages to maintain privacy for gift orders.

question: What is your privacy policy?
answer: We never sell your personal data. Your data is processed per our privacy policy at flowzint.com/privacy. Contact support for data requests.

question: How is my data used?
answer: Your data is used to process orders personalise your experience and improve our service. We never sell your data to third parties.

question: Do you sell authentic products?
answer: Yes. All products are 100% authentic and sourced directly from verified brands and authorised distributors.

question: What if I suspect a counterfeit product?
answer: Contact support immediately with photos. We take authenticity seriously and will investigate and replace or refund within 24 hours.

question: How do I leave a product review?
answer: You can leave a review on the product page within 30 days of delivery. You must have purchased the product to leave a verified review.

question: Can I change or delete my review?
answer: Yes. Visit the product page or your account's Order History to edit or delete your review within 60 days of posting.

question: What if an item goes on sale after I buy it?
answer: We offer a 48-hour price-match guarantee. Contact support within 48 hours of your purchase if the price drops and we'll refund the difference.

question: How do I use the wishlist?
answer: Click the heart icon on any product to save it to your wishlist. Access your wishlist from your account dashboard.

question: Can I share my wishlist?
answer: Your wishlist can be shared via a link. Go to your wishlist in your account and click 'Share wishlist' to generate a shareable URL.

question: How do I report a problem with an order?
answer: Contact support via chat or email with your order ID and a description of the issue. Attach photos if relevant for faster resolution.

question: What should I do if my account is hacked?
answer: Contact support immediately. We'll lock your account secure it and help you recover access. Change your password on any shared devices.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Security and toggle on two-factor authentication. You can use an authenticator app or SMS verification.
